2026-04-21T02:54:53.8361505Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8362062Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8362482Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8362845Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8363350Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8363586Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8363741Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8363916Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8364084Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8364308Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8364505Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8365156Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T02:54:53.8365420Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
